summary: Soul Score and Personalization UI testing - All major features verified working. Soul Score badge opens 'What Mira Knows' modal, dropdown scores are clickable and navigate to pet profile, dynamic banner shows current pet name, ticker z-index is above navbar.

feature_1_soul_badge_opens_modal.details: Clicking soul score badge (63% SOUL) opens 'What Mira Knows About Mojo' modal with soul score circle, intimacy text, and action buttons

feature_2_view_full_profile_button.details: Modal has 'View Full Profile' button that navigates to /my-pets?pet={petId} - verified in code at SoulKnowledgeTicker.jsx line 432

feature_3_dropdown_score_clickable.details: Pet selector dropdown shows clickable score badges with data-testid='pet-score-{petId}'. Clicking navigates to /my-pets?pet=pet-99a708f1722a

feature_4_ticker_zindex.details: Soul knowledge ticker has z-index: 100 (above navbar content but below modals) - verified via browser automation

feature_5_score_sync_after_questions.details: Score sync implemented at MiraDemoPage.jsx lines 4092-4095: setPet() and setAllPets() both updated when soul form submitted

feature_6_pet_hero_image_size.details: Avatar container is 200px (mobile) / 240px (desktop) per mira-prod.css lines 2743-2751. Glow effect defined at lines 2756-2762

feature_7_dynamic_pet_name.details: Banner shows 'For Mojo' (current pet name), not 'Buddy'

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/mira_demo_page.png - Full page with pet selector and hero
.screenshots/pet_dropdown_open.png - Pet selector dropdown with score badges
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are properly implemented and working
Token prop correctly passed to SoulKnowledgeTicker for API authentication
Score sync uses both setPet() and setAllPets() for consistency
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test pet Mojo (pet-99a708f1722a)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Soul Score and personalization features tested and working. The 'What Mira Knows' modal opens on badge click, View Full Profile navigates to /my-pets, dropdown scores are clickable, ticker is above navbar (z-index 100), score syncs after answering questions, avatar is 200px+ with glow, banner shows current pet name.
browser_automation_notes: Mobile viewport (390x844) caused browser crashes. Desktop viewport (1920x1080) worked reliably. All tests verified with desktop viewport.
